summary: Build a strategic account plan with stakeholder mapping, expansion opportunities, and risk assessment for key accounts.

inputs.name: account_data
inputs.description: Account revenue, usage, contract history, and satisfaction data.

inputs.name: relationship_history
inputs.description: Stakeholder relationships, engagement history, and sentiment.

inputs.name: expansion_signals
inputs.description: Usage trends, satisfaction scores, and expansion indicators.

outputs.name: account_plan
outputs.description: Strategic plan with quarterly objectives and actions.

outputs.name: stakeholder_map
outputs.description: Mapped stakeholders with influence, sentiment, and relationship status.

outputs.name: expansion_roadmap
outputs.description: Identified expansion opportunities with evidence and timeline.

budget.notes: Focus on evidence-based expansion and risk mitigation.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is strategic account planning, not marketing ABM or support escalation.
Require account data and relationship history before planning.
Return account plan, stakeholder map, and expansion roadmap in one consistent output.

steps.action: Analyze account health, usage trends, and satisfaction data.
Map stakeholder relationships with influence and sentiment.
Identify expansion opportunities tied to usage and satisfaction evidence.
Compile account plan with quarterly objectives, actions, and metrics.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read account data, relationship history, and usage metrics.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save account plan and stakeholder map.

verification.method: Check that stakeholders include influence level and relationship status.
Check that expansion opportunities are tied to usage or satisfaction data.
Check that risk factors and mitigation strategies are included.

success_criteria: The account plan has specific quarterly objectives and actions.
Stakeholder map includes relationship status and influence level.
Expansion opportunities are evidence-based with timeline.

rollback.when: If the plan invents account facts or assumes expansion without evidence, roll back to account data and rerun.
